query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "achieving gold-medal-level olympiad reasoning via simple and unified s" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the dependent variable of reasoning performance (accuracy on GSM8K, LogiQA, BIG-Bench Hard) in the same domain (Large Language Models) while addressing the critical efficiency constraint (token cost/latency) implied by the user's focus on "simple and unified" reasoning extensions. It also aligns with criterion (f) by operating in the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster of "token-efficient reasoning" and "prompt optimization" which are essent
